'''sadhuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyotorphin|kyotorphin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyotorphin|kyotorphin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sadhuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædhiwith|sædhiwith]] || [[word:sædhiwij|sædhiwij]] || [[word:sædhiwish|sædhiwish]] || [[word:sædhiwi|sædhiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadhudhuwuth|sadhudhuwuth]] || [[word:sadhudhuwuj|sadhudhuwuj]] || [[word:sadhudhuwush|sadhudhuwush]] || [[word:sadhudhuwu|sadhudhuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadhuwuth|sadhuwuth]] || [[word:sadhuwuj|sadhuwuj]] || [[word:sadhuwush|sadhuwush]] || [[word:sadhuwu|sadhuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadhufwuth|sadhufwuth]] || [[word:sadhufwuj|sadhufwuj]] || [[word:sadhufwush|sadhufwush]] || [[word:sadhufwuf|sadhufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sadhuwuthu|sadhuwuthu]] || [[word:sadhuwuju|sadhuwuju]] || [[word:sadhuwushu|sadhuwushu]] || [[word:sadhuwuku|sadhuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sadhuwuth|sadhuwuth]] || [[word:sadhuwuj|sadhuwuj]] || [[word:sadhuwush|sadhuwush]] || [[word:sadhuwu|sadhuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sadhuwuthul|sadhuwuthul]] || [[word:sadhuwujul|sadhuwujul]] || [[word:sadhuwushul|sadhuwushul]] || [[word:sadhuwukul|sadhuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sadhuwuthuthu|sadhuwuthuthu]] || [[word:sadhuwujuju|sadhuwujuju]] || [[word:sadhuwushushu|sadhuwushushu]] || [[word:sadhuwuku|sadhuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sadhuwuthun|sadhuwuthun]] || [[word:sadhuwujun|sadhuwujun]] || [[word:sadhuwushun|sadhuwushun]] || [[word:sadhuwukun|sadhuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sadhuwuthuoro|sadhuwuthuoro]] || [[word:sadhuwujuoro|sadhuwujuoro]] || [[word:sadhuwushuoro|sadhuwushuoro]] || [[word:sadhuwukuoro|sadhuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
